title: P2: Roaming nodes overlap with TX nodes biasing rx_count validation
description: Current roam range(20) overlaps with TX loop range(min(50,n_nodes)) so out nodes include many transmitters whose rx may be affected differently. Use non-overlapping indices e.g. range(100,120) for out, range(120,140) for in-roam to isolate propagation effect. Also 1.5x threshold arbitrary; validate avg_out near 0 for far positions. Codereview pass 2 for project-LICHEN-szub.
close_reason: All fixes applied to test_scale.py: non-overlapping roam indices (100-140), conference_area bounds used, rx_count==0 validation for far nodes + unique_peers check. Addresses P0/P2/P3.
